title: Talking to AI like a pro
tagline: The skill you'll use every single day. The same one Sam's team uses internally.
lead: Here's a secret: most people who look like "AI wizards" are just better at asking . They know how to give the model clear instructions, examples, and constraints. This is the single highest-ROI skill in your whole toolkit. The good news: it's free, takes an afternoon to learn the basics, and pays off forever.
